gate.ask: This repository is gated — request access to download and preview it.
gate.granted: You have been granted access to this repository.
gate.needsSession: Submitting an access request needs a Hub web session — connect one in Settings → Account.

like.onHub: Likes need a Hub web session — connect one in Settings → Account, or open the repo on the Hub to like it.
like.sessionExpired: Your Hub web session expired. Reconnect it in Settings → Account to like from the app.

maintainer.mergeConfirmBody: This merges the pull request into the repository. This action cannot be undone.

pr.diffTruncated: This diff was truncated — only part of the changes are shown.

preview.noPreviewBody: This file type can't be previewed here. Download it to inspect locally.
preview.pickFileBody: Choose a file on the left to see its contents here.

run.notRunning: The Space is currently in the "{{stage}}" state, so it can't run here. Open it on the Hub to wake or restart it.
